steps.title: Welcome
content_blocks: Thank you for taking part in this virtual interaction study.
In this study, you will interact with a virtual quizmaster and answer general-knowledge questions.
We are not evaluating your knowledge. Instead, we are interested in how people experience and respond to different avatar behaviors during the interaction.

steps.title: Information and Consent
steps.content: Please read the following before you continue. Participation is voluntary. You may stop at any time without any disadvantage.
steps.consent_label: I agree to participate in this study.

fields.label: Do you currently use corrective lenses?

steps.title: Avatar Selection
steps.content: Please choose the avatar you would like to interact with during the study.

steps.title: Round 1
content_blocks: You are about to begin the first quiz round.
Please speak clearly and at a natural pace.
Try not to interrupt the avatar while it is speaking.
If you do not know an answer, simply say "I don't know." If you did not hear the question clearly, you may ask for it to be repeated.
If the avatar misunderstands you, do not worry — just continue with the quiz.
When you are ready, click the button below to begin.

steps.title: Round 2
content_blocks: You are about to begin the second quiz round.
The interaction works the same way as before.
Please continue to speak clearly and at a natural pace.
If the avatar misunderstands you or you miss a question, just continue and answer as well as you can.
When you are ready, click the button below to begin.

steps.title: Thank You!
content_blocks: Thank you for participating in this study.
You may now close this window.
